steps.title: Pull out the greatest common factor
Match against the choices
steps.content:
Any factor of the original expression must appear in $q^{19}(8q-13)(8q+13)$.
  • $8q + 13$ — appears directly. Factor.
  • $64q^2 + 169$ — this is a sum of squares, not a difference; it cannot be split out of $64q^2 - 169$. Not a factor.
  • $13q - 8$ — the linear factors are $8q \pm 13$, not $13q \pm 8$. Not a factor.
  • $-105q^{44}$ — the largest power of $q$ in the expression is $q^{21}$, so $q^{44}$ cannot divide it. Not a factor.
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
